description: Configure GPredict to track a newly launched CubeSat by adding the internal TLE source http://localhost:8080/techsat.txt and updating the satellite database. Create a ground station named 'Ottawa_Lab' (45.4215 N, 75.6972 W, 70m altitude). Set up a tracking module named 'LEOP_Tracking' for the satellite 'TECHSAT-1' (NORAD ID 47438) assigned to the 'Ottawa_Lab' ground station. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
